records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
6824
In the Laliyas village records, who is the father of Mohan?
Yadunath.
6825
The son of Umapati, mentioned as Ramabhar and Haripati, hails 
from which village?
Mandar.
6826
According to the records, who is the father of Matinath in the 
Khandabla lineage?
Ratidhar.
6827
Who is the son of Hridaynandan, described as 'Prasidha Yata-dhari'? Parshumanikhndabla.
6828
The descendant Prayagdatt is the son of _____.
Hridaychandan
6829
From which village does Ganapati's son Judawan hail?
Yamugam.
6830
The son of Bhavadeva, named Gangadhar, is linked to which 
ancestral origin?
Takbal.
6831
In the lineage of Narayan and Umayika, which village is cited as 
the origin of Raghunandan's son Bhavadeva?
Mandar.
6832
Who is the son of Silinath from the Hariam lineage?
Bani.
6833
In the records, what is the origin of Govind's son Hari?
Khaual.
6834
Who is the son of Narahari from the Alay village?
Kangai.
6835
The individual Rativadi is the son of whom?
Kangai.
6836
Who is recorded as the son of Yadunath in the Sodarpur lineage?
M.M. Gopal.
6837
The daughter of Yadunath (Sodarpur) was married to descendants 
of which three names?
Ramakrishna, Shrikrishna, and Jayakrishna.
6838
Who is the son of Kamadeva from the Budhwal lineage?
Mahai.
6839
In the Panji entries, 'M.M.' is a title likely abbreviation for which 
academic honour?
Mahamahopadhyaya.
6840
The son of Mahai, mentioned as Prannath Viro, is linked to which 
origin?
Budhwal.
6841
According to the text, who is the son of Ratideva from the Karamha 
lineage?
Chitu.
6842
Who is the son of Gopinath from the Khandabla village lineage?
Baidyanath.
6843
In the Sodarpur lineage, who is the father of Gopal?
Mahadeva.
6844
The individual Vishnupati is identified as the son of whom?
Shikhu.
6845
From which village does Pitambar's son Dhanesh hail?
Mandar.
6846
The son of Shodhu, named Yadupati, is associated with which 
ancestral village?
Karamha.
6847
Who is the Maharaj mentioned as Samarsingh?
The Maharaj of Surgan.
6848
Who is identified as the son of Chhotkavan from the Sodarpur 
lineage?
Bhavadeva.
6849
In the Sakradhi lineage, who is the father of Ananda?
Jasai.
6850

Mathura?
Mathura.
6851
Which village is the origin of the son of Chintamani named Mohan? Beheradhi.
6852
Who is the son of Ratinath from the Naraun lineage?
Ramadeva.
6853

Harideva.
6854

Rupanath.
6855

Anant.
6856

lineage?
Raghudeva.
6857

Lohna Sakradhi.
6858
In the Budhwal lineage, who is the father of Manohar?
Babuk.
6859

lineage?
Jayakrishna.
6860

Purushottam.

Ganesh.
6863

Babuni.

Ramchandra recorded?
31 January 2004.
6865
Who are the sons of Thakur Ramadeva?
Lakshmipat and Harijiva.
6866
In the Mandar lineage, Yadupati is the son of whom?
Vaidik Vishwambhar.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
6867
The title 'Vaidik' is used in the text to describe which individual in 
the Mandar lineage?
Vishwambhar.
6868
Who is the son of Harakesha from the Khaual lineage?
Jagannath.
6869
In the Darihara lineage, who is the son of Batu?
Visho.
6870
The individual Aniruddha is the son of whom in the Naraun lineage? Jivnath.
6871
Who is the father of the Maharaja named Vedanand Singh?
Raja Sarvanand.
6872
The text refers to Raja Lilanand Singh Bahadur as an 'avatar' of 
which mythical figure?
Kali Karna.
6873
Who is the son of Raja Lilanand Singh?
Raja Padyanand Singh.
6874
The individual Hemnath, who is described as a 'Grammarian' 
(Vaiyakaran), is associated with which lineage?
Mahua Khaual.
6875
Who is the son of Raja Dularsingh mentioned in the records?
Raja Sarvanand.
6876

lineage.
Bheyan
6877
Who is the son of Maharaj Madhav Singh from the Khandabla 
lineage?
He was the father-in-law of Maheshdatt's son.
6878
In the Sodarpur lineage, who is the son of Purandhar?
Shaktidatt.
6879
Who is the son of Chatuimarik Mansabdar Hazari Parmanand?
Raja Dularsingh.
6880
In the Panji system, the mention of 'Kutustha' usually refers to what? The original ancestor or root of a branch.
6881
Identify the village associated with the son of Sudhakara named 
Kamadeva.
Koiyar.
6882
What is the historical period covered by the 'Genome Mapping' or 
Panji Prabandha system in the text?
The system covers the period from 450 AD to 2009 AD.
6883
In the context of the Maithil Panji records, define the term 'Panji 
Prabandha'.
It is a systematic method of managing and documenting 
genealogical records for specific communities.
6884
What is the meaning of the suffix 'Suto' or 'Suta' in the genealogical 
entries?
It translates to 'the son of' a specific individual.
6885
Within a Panji entry, what relationship does the term 'Dau' 
represent?
It signifies the maternal grandfather or the lineage of the mother's 
side.
6886
What does the term 'Mula' refer to in the Panji system?
It refers to the original root village or the foundational ancestral 
home of a family branch.
6887
According to the Khandabala records, who is identified as the son 
of Mani Ram?
Mahi is identified as the son of Mani Ram.
6888

with the Mander village.
Janardan is recorded as the son of Devnath.
6889

according to the Mander records?
Mander is the village associated with Pitambar's lineage.
6890

as his family's origin?
Ghusout is cited as the village of origin for Lakshamana.
6891

village of Satlakha?
Padmapati, Pranapati, Lakshmipati, and Shripataya are recorded as 
the sons of Harikesh.
6892

Belauch records?
Devadhar and Muralidhar are listed as the sons of Kamalapani.
6893

Sakrarhi section?
The family of Vidyanath originated from the village of Sakrarhi.
6894

Karmaha branch?

Ishan Nath.
6895
Which individual is identified as the son of Jayadev in the Sodarpur 
records?
Bachruk is identified as the son of Jayadev.
6896

Gauri and Kashi?
Rama Chandra himself is recorded as the son of Kashi, who was 
the son of Gauri.
6897

Sakrarhi records?
Tekenath is the father of Ghane.
6898

Ghusout records.
Bhavanandan.
6899
Which title is associated with Gokulanath in the genealogical 
descriptions?

(Commentator).
6900

Haridev is identified as the son of Anath.
6901

6902

Mohan is listed as the son of Chinta Mani.
6903

_____.
Pranapati.
6904
Who is recorded as the son of Yadunath in the Ganoli branch?
Kashinath and Shurangkar are recorded as the sons of Yadunath.

Who is the father of Jitendranarayan in the Pauraripar Ratauli 
lineage?
Harigovind.
8336
Identify the son of Jitendranarayan mentioned in the genealogy of 
section 148.
Parashar.
8337
Harinarayan's two sons are recorded as Jayadharman and _____.
Radhadharman.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
8338
In the lineage of Jayadharman, who is his son?
Kamal Nayan.
8339
In the record for 'Ananda' (149), who are his three daughters?
Ratnananda, Hirananda, and Medhananda.
8340
Who is the son of Hirananda recorded in the Maivi branch?
Modananda.
8341
The sons of Babu Phaninanda are recorded as Ramananda and 
_____.
Gunananda.
8342
Who are the two sons of Gribananda in the lineage of Nityananda?
Maniknandan and Motinandan.
8343
In the lineage of Gribananda, what is the name of his son who 
married into the family of Maharaja Madhav Singh?
Chandrananda.
8344
Who is the son of Nikananda mentioned in section 150?
Phalananda.
8345
Phalananda is the father of which two individuals?
Bodhananda and Dolananda.
8346
In the lineage of Dolananda, who are his two sons?
Dayananda and Vidyananda.
8347
Who are the two sons of Girijananda mentioned in the Lohana 
branch?
Tarananda and Ambikananda.
8348
Tarananda is the father of which two sons?
Bhimananda and Medhananda.
8349
Bhimananda's son is recorded as _____.
Sadananda.
8350
Who is the son of Medhananda in the Lohana sub-branch?
Lekhananda.
8351
In the lineage of 'Feku' (Ugrananda), who is his son?
Babu Lokananda.
8352
Babu Lokananda's three sons are Gokulananda, Mathurananda, and 
_____.
Mokshananda (also known as Bulin).
8353
Who is the father of Gayananda and Purnananda in the Gangoli 
lineage?
Chirananda (also known as Ghaudhi).
8354
Identify the two sons of Purnananda in the Gangoli branch.
Vinodananda and Shivananda.
8355
In the lineage of 'Gopinanda', who is his son?
Krishnananda.
8356
Who is the father of the three sons Toyananda, Samirananda, and 
Shivananda?
Krishnananda.
8357
The son of Bhairavananda is recorded as _____.
Devananda.
8358
Who is the son of Chandrananda, also known as Manbhiran?
Machmatnandan.
8359
Machmatnandan (Manbhiran) is the father of which individual, also 
known as Lal Gopal Ji?
Vishwananda.
8360
Who are the two sons of Gopalji mentioned in section 152?
Baldev and Vijay.
8361
In the lineage of Kanhai (Hemnath), who is the son who was based 
in Hariamb?
Bankhandi.
8362
Srinath is the father of which individual, mentioned as marrying 
into the family of Kavi Ved-Dutt?
Vabuan.
8363
Identify the son of Jagannath mentioned in the Ratauli Ujian branch. Bhailal.
8364
In the genealogy of Chaturbhuj (153), who is his son?
Gopal.
8365
Gopal's son is recorded as the Vedic practitioner _____.
Jivanath.
8366
Who is the father of Abhaynath, Hridaynath, and Gopinath in the 
Sarisab branch?
Yunnath.
8367
Abhaynath's two sons are recorded as Bhivar and _____.
Lala.
8368
Who is the father of Kulananda in the Niun branch?
Harshanath.
8369
In the lineage of Hridaynath, who are his two sons?
Bhuvanath and Jayanath.
8370
Who is the father of Ramanath in the Khondbala branch?
Bhuvanath.
8371
Mahinath's four daughters are named Wareshwari, Machireshwari, 
Dharmeshwari, and _____.
Narayani.
8372
In the Gangoli lineage (154), who are the two sons of Rudradutt?
Shivlal and Vacha (Chandi Dutt).
8373
Identify the two sons of Shivlal in the Gangoli branch.
Chitrapati and Damodar.
8374
Who are the two sons of Sanphul mentioned in section 154?
Kirtinath and Harinath.
8375
Kirtinath's son is recorded as _____.
Ugranath.
8376
In the lineage of Harinath, who are his two sons?
Kishorenath and Lilanath.
8377
In the Shishausal Mandar branch (163), who are the two sons of 
Bhurshi?
Khagpati and Raghupati.
8378
Who is the son of Khagpati in the Shishausal lineage?
Vachak.
8379
Vachak's four sons are Yagyapati, Chandrapati, Yashaspati, and 
_____.
Haripati.
8380
In the lineage of Yagyapati, who are his two sons?
Vuchi and Mukunda.
8381
Identify the three sons of Mukunda in the Shishausal branch.
Madhusudan, Kameshwar (Umapati), and Phanipati.
8382
Who is the father of Sunil and Ashok in the Shishausal branch?
Kameshwar (Umapati).
8383
Identify the two sons of Phanipati.
Bhola and Ramesh.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
8384
In the lineage of Haripati, who are his two sons?
Balbhadra and Kashinath.
8385
Kashinath is the father of which two individuals in the Shishausal 
branch?
Jaykrishna and Amritkrishna.
8386
Who is the father of Jayanand and Khelpati in the Shishausal 
lineage?
Janardana.
8387
According to section 165, Premakar is the father of which 
individual?
Bhaktinath.
8388
Who are the two sons of 'Mahu' Durgadhar mentioned in the 
Shishausal lineage?
Nagesh and Vidyadhar.
8389
The genealogist 'Abhinav Murari' completed the Ratouli-Darihara 
records on which date?
09 July 2008 (Wednesday).
8390
In the Rajauragram branch (159), who are the two sons of 
Dasharatha?
Ramchandra and Shrikrishna.
8391
Dasharatha also had a son named _____, who was from the 
Sodarpur branch.
Bandhuka.
8392
Who is the father of Rati-pati and Tul-pati in the Rajauragram 
lineage?
Kulapati.
8393
In the lineage of Damodar, who are his two sons?
Nandipati and Chatrapati.
8394
Nandipati's three sons are Chiranjeev, Ratanjeev, and _____.
Tulapati.
8395
Who is the father of Mahaveer and Mohit in the Rampur branch 
(160)?
Ramananda.
8396
In the lineage of Gopal (Vabue), his son is recorded as _____.
Lakshmana (Pradyumna).
8397
Who are the three sons of Vachhu in the Rampur branch?
Yugandhara, Bhola, and Kantuka.
8398
Yugandhara's son is recorded as _____.
Devananda.
8399
In the Rampur lineage, who is the father of Brajananda, 
Harshananda, Chandrananda, and Dharmananda?
Devananda.
8400
In the context of the Panji Prabandh genealogical records, what 
does the term 'Sut' denote?
It is used to denote a 'son' in the lineage.
8401
In the Maithil genealogical system, what does the abbreviation 'Dau' 
(Dauhitra) specifically represent?
It represents the maternal lineage, specifically a grandson through a 
daughter.
8402
What is the primary meaning of the term 'Mool' within the Maithil 
Brahmin genealogical system?
It refers to the original ancestral village or the primary lineage of a 
family.
8403
According to section 2.85, who is the father of Raghutirtha from 
the Sodarpur Mool?
Harinath.
8404
In Uptip 167, the scholar Jivanath is recorded as having which two 
sons?
Bhavadev and Gujar.
8405
Who are identified as the two sons of Jnan from the Khandwala 
Mool?
Ramkrishna and Gopal.
8406
Which specific title is applied to Dinbandhu in Uptip 167 to 
indicate his expertise in grammar?
Maha Vaiyakarana (Great Grammarian).
8407
The scholar Jivanath, son of Dinbandhu, is described by which two 
titles related to language and literature?
Bahu Bhashavid (Polyglot) and Sahityakar (Litterateur).
8408
Indranath and Chandranath are the two sons of which individual in 
the Bataha lineage?
Vishnupati.
8409
In Uptip 168, Shambhunath and Nirannath are identified as the 
sons of which scholar?
Vaiyakarana Jivanath.
8410
Which royal figure is the daughter of Muktinath (alias Kamala) 
married to, according to the Khandwala records?
Babu Vijaynath Singh.
8411
In Uptip 169, which King is the daughter of Yugandhara recorded

Raja Vijay Govind Singh.
8412
The son of Totai (alias Taradatta), Vanshilal, is associated with a 
maternal link (Dau) to which village?
Irauri.
8413
In the lineage of Shrimohan, which six sons are listed in the records? Pramod, Subodh, Kamod, Bheshnath, Bhavanath, and Lekhnath.
8414
Who is the son of Anand Mohan associated with the village of 
Sarisab?
Suman.
8415
In Uptip 170, Bhagwandatta Jha is recorded as the son of which 
individual?
Latdu.
8416
According to Uptip 170, the daughter of Manohar is married into 
the family of which royal from Alaya?
Raja Lilanand Singh.
8417
Who are the two sons of Vishnupati (alias Bataha) mentioned in 
section 84?
Indranath and Chandranath.
8418
In the lineage of Indranath, who is the son of Luchai mentioned 
from the Sodarpur Mool?
Rishinath.
8419
Premnath, the son of Bachru, is identified with which specific 
Mool?
Karmaha.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
8420
Taranand Singh Jha's sons include Kalikanand, Shyamand, 
Jaganand, Dayanand, and which other individual?
Adyanand.
8421
In Uptip 172, the son of Yugandhara, Dinanand (alias Chheti), has 
maternal links to which village?
Khandwala.
8422
Who is the son of Omanand Singh Jha from the Sodarpur Mool 
recorded in Uptip 172?
Ekanand Singh.
8423
Which professional medical title is used for Shyam Sundar in Uptip 
177?
M.B.B.S.
8424
The term 'Gramarambha' used throughout the text signifies the 
_____ of the record for a specific village.
Beginning.
8425
In Uptip 174, Manik Singh is recorded as having which son?
Bihari Singh.
8426
Bhup Singh's sons, Vishnu Singh and Govind Singh, are associated 
with which Mool?
Sodarpur.
8427
The daughter of Vishnu Singh is recorded as being married to 
which royal in Surgan?
Raja Rupnarayan.
8428
In Uptip 175, Jayandand's son Jagatnand is linked to which village? Karmaha.
8429
Who is the son of Jivapati mentioned in the context of the Lohana 
Uptip (176)?
Manipati.
8430
Buli, the son of Manipati, belongs to which village lineage?
Irauri.
8431
Which two sons of Bhol are mentioned as belonging to the 
Karmaha Mool?
Kashinath and Shankarnath.
8432
In Uptip 176, who are identified as the two sons of Jyotishi Bataha? Chhakauri and Haladhar.
8433
Which royal title is associated with Madhav Singh in Uptip 177?
Maharaja.
8434
Maharaja Chhatra Singh is identified as the son of which previous 
Maharaja?
Maharaja Madhav Singh.
8435
Who is the father of the individual Vihari in the Sodarpur Mool?
Haridatta.
8436
The son of Thengni, identified as Vuchi (alias Krishnadatta), 
belongs to which Mool?
Sodarpur.
8437
Who are the two sons of Banke (alias Hemkant) recorded in the 
Irauri village records?
Balbhadra and Balaram.
8438
In the records of the Matandari village (178), who is the father of 
Bacchi and Chhotku?
Durgadatta.
8439
Pinakinath (alias Ganesh) is the son of which person from the 
Sodarpur Mool?
Lalitnath.
8440
The son of Sahityakar Bhavanath (alias Deepak) is recorded as 
belonging to which Mool?
Harinamb.
8441
Which village section follows 'Matandari' in Uptip 179?
Madari Waliyas.
8442
In the Madari records, who are listed as the sons of Indrapati?
Ganapati, Bacche (alias Sandipati), Gauripati, Shipati, and Bhupati.
8443
The son of Ganapati, named Devapati, is associated with which 
village?
Budhwal.
8444
Who are the three sons of Lokpati mentioned in the Sodarpur 
records?
Punyapati, Thakurpati, and Mahavir.
8445
In the lineage of Punyapati, the son Nagarjapati has a maternal link 
(Dau) to which village?
Sodarpur.
8446
The daughter of Mahavir, named Tantrapati, is recorded as married 
into which village?
Irauri.
8447
In Uptip 180, who is identified as the son of Mani (alias 
Vidhyapati)?
Sone.
8448
Bhayo Jha is the son of Sone and belongs to which Mool according 
to the text?
Khandwala.
8449
Which village is the daughter of Chandreshwar, Ganganath, linked 
to in Uptip 180?
Sodarpur.
8450
Who is the son of Rameshwar from the Khandwala Mool recorded 
in section 2.91?
Raghunath.
8451
In Uptip 181, Gauri Shankar is recorded as having which two sons? Shivshankar and Vishnu.
8452
Durgapati, the son of Yogeshwar, is associated with which village 
lineage?
Budhwal.
8453
The son of Amarendra, named Loknath, is associated with which 
village in section 2.92?
Irauri.
8454
In the lineage of Phuchi, who is the father of the daughter named 
Kalikeshwar?
Modapati.
8455
In the lineage records of Sulhani (Uptip 183), who are the three 
daughters of Sone?
Bhairavdatta, Chintamani, and Chhotkani.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:

The academic/scholarly title 'Maho' (Mahopadhyay) is prefixed to 
which son of Bhairavdatta?
Bachi.

In Uptip 183, which son of Ananta is recorded as being from the 
Kodariya village?
Narayan Ji.

Who is the son of Madan Mohan recorded from the village of 
Gangoli?
Shailesh.

Who are the two sons of Umesh recorded in the Sarisab village

Lakshmikant and Shri Dev.

In Uptip 185, who is the son of Harijiv belonging to the Sakaradhi 
Mool?
Balbhadra.
8461
Chhatranath is the son of which person from the Sarisab Mool 
according to section 2.94?
Kashinath.
8462
The son of Shesha, named Yuganath, is associated with which 
Mool in section 2.94?
Khandwala.
8463
In Uptip 186, the daughter of Shambhunath (alias Shobhanath) is 
recorded as being married into which village?
Madar.
8464
What village is associated with the 'Mool' of Bhavadev in Uptip 
167?
Puaripa.
8465
Under the record for Hanu's daughter, Bhavanidatta is the son of 
whom?
Harinath.
8466
The daughter of Ganganath is married into the family of which 
royal individual from Alaya?
Raja Kritiyanand Singh.
8467
In Uptip 169, Kamoladatta is the daughter of whom?
Bechan.
8468
The son of Bhagwanadatta, named Chhandradev, belongs to which 
Mool?
Karmaha.
8469
According to Uptip 170, the daughter of Bagdu is married into 
which Mool?
Karmaha.
8470
In the context of the Mithila Panji Prabandh, what does the term 
'Sut' denote?
Son.
8471
What relationship is indicated by the term 'Suta' in these 
genealogical excerpts?
Daughter.
8472
In the genealogical records, what does the term 'Dau' (or 'Dauo') 
represent?
The maternal grandfather or the maternal lineage connection.
8473
According to entry 187, who is the father of Badri in the 
Punwaripath Suluhani lineage?
Govinda.
8474
Identify the maternal grandfather (Dau) of Badri, as recorded in the 
first entry of the text.
Badu, the son of Prannath from Sakaradhi.
8475
The individual Khadagi, son of Jaladhar, belongs to which specific 
village lineage?
Maudar.
8476
In entry 187, who is recorded as the father of the brothers 
Chandranath and Lokanath?
Badu.
8477
Who is the father of the brothers Dinanath and Balli in the Niruadh 
Shivnath lineage?
Shivnath.
8478
Identify the maternal grandfather (Dau) of Dinanath from the 
Khandabala lineage.
Sarvajeet Singh, the son of Kamal Singh.
8479
Dwarikanath is recorded in the lineage as the son of which 
individual?
Dinanath.
8480
According to entry 188, who is identified as the son of Buddhikar?
Tejnanath.
8481
Tejnanath's maternal lineage (Dau) is traced back to which 
individual from the Sarisab village?
Devidutt, the son of Bhawanidutt.
8482
In the Panji records, who is the father of Gaurinath in the Ghanghi 
lineage?
Ghanghi.
8483

individual and village?
Maninath, the son of Dharmanath from Khandabala.

The individual Balamukund is identified as the son of _____.
Manihar.
8485
In entry 189, the siblings Pramod, Subodh, and Balabodh are the 
children of which father?
Parashuram.
8486
Who is the 'Dau' of Parashuram's son, Pramod?
Gauridutt, the son of Tirthadutt from Sodarpur.
8487
Identify the sons of Tuna as recorded in entry 189 of the 
genealogical text.
Taranath, Dharmnath, and Bhagiratha.
8488
In the lineage of Shaktinath Singh (Champanagar Deodhi), who is 
the father of Jagannath?
Buddhinath.
8489
Identify the maternal grandfather (Dau) of Jagannath from the 
Shaktinath Singh lineage.
Thethai, the son of Bhawanidutt from Sodarpur.
8490
According to entry 190, who are the two sons of Pushpanath?
Harshanath and Munika.
8491
Who is the 'Dau' of Harshanath, the son of Pushpanath?
Badu, the son of Teknath from Karmaha.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
8492
Madhusudan's son, mentioned in the lineage of entry 190, is named 
_____.
Dharmanath.
8493
Who is the father of Kapileshwar in the lineage of Rathinath?
Rathinath (specifically the Kakhantar progenitor).
8494
Kapileshwar's daughter is recorded as being married to the son of 
_____ from Khandabala.
Vishnu Singh's son Chandreshwar Singh.
8495
In the Alaya lineage (entry 190), who is the son of Brahmanand?
Mithilesh.
8496
The 'Dau' of Mithilesh is identified as which specific judicial figure? Rathikanth, the son of Harikanth.
8497
Amarnath and Vijaynath are the sons of _____ in the progeny of 
Phuchi.
Phuchi (Shaktinath progenitor).
8498
Identify the maternal grandfather (Dau) of Amarnath and Vijaynath. Bhagwat Narayan, the son of Chiranjiv from Tisaunt.
8499
In entry 191, Jivan and Gadapani are identified as the sons of 
_____.
Banka Umanath.
8500
Who is the father of Baijnath in the lineage of Jivan?
Nityanand.
8501
Tirthanath's 'Dau' is recorded as being the son of _____ from the 
Bulwal village.
Vidyaman, the son of Lulli.
8502
Identify the father of the scholar Sir Ganganath Jha, as mentioned 
in entry 191.
Vaidyanath Jha.
8503
Sir Ganganath Jha's maternal lineage (Dau) is connected to which 
progenitor from Sakaradhi?
Harshanath.
8504
In entry 192, Janakinath is identified as the son of _____.
Dayanath.
8505
Janakinath's maternal grandfather is from which prominent lineage 
in Khandabala?
The Maharaja Madhav Singh lineage.
8506
Identify the sons of Faujdar Badrinath as listed in entry 193.
Vishvanath, Raghunandan, and Akshayanath.
8507
Who is the father of Harinand in the lineage of Vishvanath?
Vishvanath.
8508
In the genealogical records, Sitanand is identified as the son of 
_____.
Brajanand.
8509
In the Sodarpur lineage (entry 193), who is the father of 
Sachidanand?
Ramabhadra, the son of Pridhitnath.
8510
Identify the two sons of Vabu Manmohan recorded in entry 194.
Purandar (Tejnanath) and Phude (Ganganath).
8511
Identify the two sons of Tejnanath in the Sodarpur lineage.
Punyanath and Kamalanath.
8512
The children of Kamalanath trace their maternal grandfather (Dau) 
to which individual from Sodarpur?
Baduji, the son of Thithar.
8513
According to entry 194, who is the father of Tankanath and 
Varadanand?
Keshavnath.
8514
Tankanath's maternal grandfather (Dau) is identified as _____ from 
the Pali village.
Jayanath, the son of Khaganath.
8515
Who is the father of Abhaynath in the Dhaneiyampuri lineage 
(entry 195)?
Bholanath.
8516
In the Darrihara lineage, Chandranath is recorded as the son of 
_____.
Tejnanath.
8517
Who is the father of the brothers Bhirvinath and Revatinath in entry 
198?
Jagannath.
8518
In entry 197, Chatrapati's son Gopala identifies his 'Dau' (maternal 
line) as _____.
Durgaditya from the Maudar village.
8519
Who are the two sons of Gopala from the Hemnath lineage?
Manohar and Chumman (Vabu).
8520
In the lineage of Manohar, the maternal grandfather (Dau) is 
recorded as _____ from Khandabala.
Madhav Singh.
8521
In entry 199, Raghunandan is identified as the son of _____.
Vabu Chumman.
8522
Identify the father of Ruchipati, Bholanath, and Eknath as listed in 
entry 203.
Gangadutt.
8523
In the Panji records, who is the son of Ruchipati?
Pachkaudi.
8524
In the progeny of Taranath (entry 204), who is the father of Prof. 
Tankanath?
Taranath.
8525
Identify the sons of Maninath as listed in the 204th entry of the 
record.
Jivanath, Devinath, and Dipnath.
8526
According to entry 205, Ugranath is a professor of which academic 
discipline?
Sociology (Samajshastri).
8527
Who is the father of the brothers Shambhunath and Umanath in 
entry 190?
Phaturi (Shobhanath progenitor).
8528
The village 'Karmaha' is frequently mentioned in the records as the 
seat of the progenitor _____.
Jalpadutt.
8529
The individual Lakshminath's 'Dau' (maternal grandfather) is linked 
to which person from Khandabala?
Prannath, the son of Maninath.

records.label: पञ्जी PDF 14 — खण्ड 1 (block 350–690, IAST)
records.text:
8530
Who is the father of the brothers Shivnath and Sumatinath in entry 
200?
Bholanath.
8531
The 'Dau' of Shivnath and Sumatinath is identified as _____ from 
the Phandaha village.
Madhukanth, the son of Maungu.
8532
In the Punwaripath lineage, who is recorded as the son of 
Muktinath?
Dharmanath.
8533
Dharmanath's maternal grandfather is from which lineage in the 
Pali village?
Damodar, the son of Manibhar.
8534
The excerpts identify 'Raja Lilaianand Singh' as the son of which 
King?
Raja Vedanand Singh.
8535
Who is the father of the brothers Ramabhadra and Virabhadra in 
entry 206?
Balabhadra.
8536
Ramabhadra's maternal lineage (Dau) is traced to which person in 
the Pali village?
Kedarnath, the son of Purandar.
8537
According to entry 191, who is the 'Dau' (maternal grandfather) of 
the sons of Banka Umanath?
Motinand, the son of Nityanand from Darihara.
8538
In the Maithil Panji genealogical records, what does the term 'Sut' 
(à¤¸à¥à¤¤) denote?
It denotes 'son'.
8539
What does the term 'Suta' (à¤¸à¥ à¤¤à¤¾) indicate when listing 
names in these records?
It indicates 'sons' (plural).
8540
In the context of Panji entries, what does the abbreviation 'Ddau' 
(à¤¦à¥à¤¦à¥Œo) signify?
It refers to a genealogical link, typically a daughter's marriage or a 
specific lineage connection.
8541
Which major Maithil Brahmin lineage is associated with the village 
'Sodarpur'?
The Sodarpur Sakhi.
8542
According to the Loam village records, who was the father of Raja 
Devanarayan?
Ray Chandrarayan.
8543
Who succeeded Raja Devanarayan as 'Ray Ramnarayan'?
His son, Ray Ramnarayan.
8544
The title 'M.M.U.' found before names like Gangesh stands for 
_____.
Mahamahopadhyaya.
8545
Who was the son of Maharaja Madhav Singh mentioned in the 
genealogical transitions?
Maharaj Chhatra Singh.
8546
According to the lineage of Maharaja Chhatra Singh, who was his 
son that became 'Maharudra Singh'?
Maharaj Rudra Singh.
8547
